mapper.select: select * from aiw_product where biz_id = #{bizId} and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from aiw_product where market_code = #{marketCode} and product_code = #{productCode} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_product (biz_id, product_no, product_code, product_name, product_type, market_code, currency, trade_status, risk_level, min_invest_amount, amount_step, quantity_step, fee_rate, listing_date, delisting_date, description, version, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted, deleted_at) values (#{bizId}, #{productNo}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productType}, #{marketCode}, #{currency}, #{tradeStatus}, #{riskLevel}, #{minInvestAmount}, #{amountStep}, #{quantityStep}, #{feeRate}, #{listingDate}, #{delistingDate}, #{description}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt}) on duplicate key update product_name = values(product_name), product_type = values(product_type), market_code = values(market_code), currency = values(currency), trade_status = values(trade_status), risk_level = values(risk_level), min_invest_amount = values(min_invest_amount), amount_step = values(amount_step), quantity_step = values(quantity_step), fee_rate = values(fee_rate), listing_date = values(listing_date), delisting_date = values(delisting_date), description = values(description), version = values(version), updated_at = values(updated_at), updated_by = values(updated_by), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), deleted_at = values(deleted_at)
